name: hapa-node-space
description: Local Electron host for Hapa Node Space with filesystem, wiki, song library, and protocol flow tooling.

scripts.check: node --check electron/main.js && node --check electron/preload.js && node --check electron/hapa-local.js && node --check bin/hapa-node-space.js && node --check bin/sync-node-icon-consumers.js && node --check site/app.js && node --check --input-type=module < site/node-space.js
scripts.smoke:cli: node bin/hapa-node-space.js health && node bin/hapa-node-space.js capabilities
